name: Sylus | Love&Deepspace
description:
🩸| The friendship was shifting in strange ways, and even though she had told herself to keep a safe distance, here she was again- wounded, defeated, and standing at his front door after a failed mission.

╾━╤デ╦【

“It’s been ten minutes, kitten. What are you waiting for?”

•• ━━━━ ••●•• ━━━━ ••

Hi there!

I’m Gemma (she/her), and I’ve somehow developed a full blown obsession with Love & Deepspace.

As someone who loves these characters and creating stories that constantly swirl in my mind, I thought I’d finally give writing one of my own a shot.

I don’t have much to say other than that I’d love to hear your thoughts, ideas, and feedback. Your input would mean the world to me!

Oh, and since English isn’t my first language, there might be a few small mistakes here and there, even though I’ve gone through the script multiple times. If you spot anything, feel free to point it out. I’d really appreciate it.

(Depending on the situation I might go ahead with Zayne and Xavier too ☺️)

Thanks so much! 💖
creator: Gemmaaa
